quality_notes: All candidates returned parseable JSON with the required top-level output shapes.
All candidates held review-ready and verification-complete claims pending downstream evidence.
All candidates excluded private payloads, secrets, runtime absolute paths, actual _workspaces content, and actual _workmeta payload storage.
A is compact but sufficient; B and C are more complete but slower and token-heavier.
selection_note: Because every candidate passed the hard gate and quality deltas were below the 10-point override threshold, the lowest-token and fastest passing candidate is selected.
